name: Barbell Romanian Deadlift
form_cues: Soft knees, push hips back as the bar slides down the thighs
Bar travels in a vertical line — close to the legs
Stop at mid-shin or wherever you lose flat-back; don't chase the floor
Squeeze glutes hard at the top
notes: Posterior chain emphasis. Load progressively heavier than DB version once form is dialed.
video_id_query: Barbell Romanian Deadlift how to proper form Jeff Nippard
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width, barbell over mid-foot. Grip just outside the legs, pronated.
Brace core, pull shoulders back and down. Slight knee bend; chest tall.
Push your hips back (not down) as the bar slides along the thighs. Keep the back flat.
Lower until you feel a strong hamstring stretch or the bar is mid-shin — whichever comes first.
Drive hips forward to stand up. Lockout glutes at the top; don't hyperextend the lumbar.
